reference: I was feeling fine the other day. I have panic attacks and I have been overwhelmed with too much stress. I was talking fast and slurred my words a little for about two or three minutes. Then I had someone on my mind; I knew who I was talking to, but I said the other person's name and then I really panicked. What can I do to stop these attacks? I worry for no reason.
text: i was really fine the other day i have panic attacks and i have been overwhelmed with too much stress i was talking fast and slurred my words a little for about two or three minutes then i had someone on my mind i knew who i was talking to but i said the other person's name and then i really panicked what can i do to stop these attacks i worry for no reason
